new_finding_run103.root_cause: meta_learning/insights.json morning WR (71%) computed from backtest signals, NOT live trades. Known pattern: SOL_SHORT also showed same discrepancy (63.7% backtest vs 33% live).
new_finding_run103.impact: Previous runs claimed P1: 'missed $8-12K EV from morning edge'. This is OVERSTATED. Live morning WR=28% is negative EV. Morning edge should NOT be re-activated when bot restarts.
new_finding_run103.action: Do NOT add tod_morning_edge_v1 to data/llm/graduated_rules.json on restart. Monitor morning WR on 25 live trades. If WR < 40%, add MORNING_VETO rule.

weak_setups.status: DOWNGRADED: live WR=28% contradicts backtest. NOT an edge.

new_anomaly_run103.detail: Live trading: morning (06-12 UTC) = 28% WR on 18 trades (-$76.94). Backtest: 69.5% WR on 20 trades. Previous P1 finding 'missed $8-12K morning EV' was based on unreliable backtest data. Meta_learning insights source is backtest, not live trades.
new_anomaly_run103.action: Do NOT activate tod_morning_edge_v1 on restart. Monitor live morning trades (need n=25 to confirm). If WR < 40%, add morning veto rule.

high_priority_findings.finding: MORNING EDGE IS NEGATIVE EV IN LIVE TRADING: MORNING_EDGE_REVIEW in feedback/graduated_rules.json confirms live morning (06-12 UTC) = 28% WR on 18 real trades (-$76.94). Previous P1 finding claiming 'missed $8-12K EV' was based on backtest signals. Meta_learning insights module reports backtest WR as live WR.
high_priority_findings.action: DOWNGRADE morning edge from P1 to MONITORING. Do NOT add tod_morning_edge_v1 on restart. Monitor first 25 live morning trades. Add morning veto if WR < 40%.

high_priority_findings.finding: META_LEARNING DATA UNRELIABILITY: Morning edge (71% backtest vs 28% live) is the SECOND confirmed case. First: SOL_SHORT (63.7% backtest vs 33% live). All meta_learning insights should be treated as backtest hypotheses requiring live validation.
high_priority_findings.action: Require live-trade confirmation (n>=20) before acting on meta_learning recommendations. Discount backtest-sourced WR claims by 20-30pp.
